seoTitle: Byron Bay vs Byrrill Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Byron Bay and Byrrill Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Byron Bay vs Byrrill Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Byron Bay and Byrrill Creek.
heading: Byron Bay vs Byrrill Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Byron Bay, New South Wales and Byrrill Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Byron Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Byrrill Creek (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Byron Bay or Byrrill Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Byron Bay has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Byrrill Creek scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Byron Bay scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Byrrill Creek scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Byron Bay or Byrrill Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Byron Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
